query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_zerados,
  SUM(CASE WHEN quantity = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exatos_zero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN quantity < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as negativos
FROM inventory
WHERE quantity <= 0;
